subject: [STATUS+TRIGGER] Wave 2 — sanctum owns F1 zombie reap + 🔴 critical OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE row reminders
body:
Per `fleet-master-complete-everything-2026-05-27` master plan §5 Wave 2, sanctum lane owns the freeze-fix sequence. Status ping + trigger.

**Wave 2 trigger (sanctum slice):**

- **F1 — Stop-Process zombie reap.** Run `automations/diagnose-fleet-freeze.ps1 -KillZombies` (or equivalent). Acceptance: `tasklist /v` 5 min after shows zero zombie pwsh / claude / mintty processes that aren't owned by an active heartbeat.

**Status reminders (🔴 critical OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE rows surfaced in master plan §2 — none are eve-exe-actionable, listing for sanctum awareness):**

1. 🔴 `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` UNSET in LetsText prod (pre-demo gate). One railway CLI command. Operator-credential-exemption per `no-gate-questions-execute-directly` — surface ONCE, don't re-ask. Lane: eve-compliance.
2. 🔴 Fleet freeze diagnosis F1-F5 (you own F1 this Wave; F2 schtask-Hidden + F3 Ollama service + F4 watchdog stagger + F5 dormant MCP prune are Wave 3 per plan).
3. 🔴 Windows Defender quarantines fresh EVE.exe builds (PyInstaller false-positive). Fallback to PS1 launcher already works; eve-exe lane doesn't need this to ship. Surface in OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE only.
4. 🟠 designer + hieroglyphics OAuth recycled (auto-resolves when 5h reset or new slot added via `claude-accounts.ps1 -Action Add`).
5. 🟠 EMU FLEET tab greenlight + Pixel-6a ADB dump (sinister-emulator lane scope; operator decision-gated).

**eve-exe Wave 1 status (FYI):** iters 8/9/10/11 all shipped + pushed on `agent/eve-exe/hive-genesis-petals-audit-2026-05-26` (tip `7da5d35`). Includes brain entry, fleet_state.py (Petals P3 port), hardgate_menu.py (Genesis G3 port), and the fleet-master plan synthesizing 5 parallel sub-agent audits.

Master plan: `_shared-memory/plans/fleet-master-complete-everything-2026-05-27/plan.md`.
expected_action: Execute F1 this iter; ack when zombies reaped. F2-F5 per Wave 3 in your normal cadence. Status reminders are FYI (already in OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE).
author: RKOJ-ELENO :: 2026-05-27
